ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Janice Mendenhall, Plaintiff. Court orders case dismissed at the request of Plaintiff. Court also vacates sanctions previously issued for failure to appear at the FEB-25-2014 Order to Show Cause hearing. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Motion For Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF JANICE MENDENHALL's Motion For Judgment is denied. Plaintiff is seeking a default and/or default judgment and this department does not process such requests. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
